nasb.text: Then Isaiah the prophet came to King Hezekiah and said to him, “What did these men say, and from where have they come to you?” And Hezekiah said, “They have come to me from a far country, from Babylon.”

esv.text: Then Isaiah the prophet came to King Hezekiah, and said to him, “What did these men say? And from where did they come to you?” Hezekiah said, “They have come to me from a far country, from Babylon.”

cnv.text: 於是以賽亞先知來見希西家王，問他說：“這些人說了些甚麼？他們從哪裡來見你？”希西家說：“他們是從遠方的巴比倫來見我的。”

ccb.text: 以赛亚先知来见希西迦王，问他：“这些人说了些什么？他们从哪里来？” 希西迦答道：“他们从遥远的巴比伦来。”

csbs.text: 于是先知以赛亚去希西加王那里问他：“那些人说了什么？他们是从哪里来见你的？” 希西加回答：“他们是从遥远之地巴比伦来见我的。”
